title: Genome-Resolved Metagenomics of Rice Straw Degradation Experiments in Colombian Fields (MAGs and Suppl. files)
author: Yepes García, Jeferyd
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Dataset encompassing: 
 
 Mid-quality MAGs. 
 High-quality MAGs. 
 Associated metadata useful to track down the downstream analysis process of the MAGs. 
 Scripts run to characterize, annotate and organize the samples/MAGs through tools such as dbCAN3, Prokka, COGClassifier, KEGG Decoder, FastANI, MAGFlow, FastQC, nf-core/mag, FetchMG, GTDB-Tk2, among others. 
 Outputs from the software above-mentioned. 
 Mock community information to ensure the reliability of the DNA extraction and bioinformatics pipeline. 
 R executable script to perform downstream processing and data visualization. 
 Files to generate iTOL figures. 
 Supplementary tables and figures.
